story: STRONG: a marginally certified AFA system can conceal a trajectory-defined stratum for which no stopping threshold in the precommitted family meets the target; CAFA audits this family-wide failure and uses a common-threshold certificate that refuses when evidence does not support simultaneous validity.

decisions.lambda_ref_status: fine-resolution analysis; sweep {0.5,0.7,0.9} committed in tooling (provenance json q3/q4)
decisions.plugin_label: not shown unreliable at this resolution
decisions.iut_refusal_class: A: refusal with certified family-wide failure
decisions.allowed_phrase: On this stratum, no stopping threshold in the audited precommitted threshold family attains the target and no prefix depth along the frozen acquisition path attains it.
decisions.prohibited_phrase: 'no possible feature subset, policy, acquisition strategy, or budget can attain the target' (never licensed); 'no budget works' beyond the audited family
